settings.notes: Warmup-corrected aggregate excludes the first prompt result for every config.

configs.label: B_strict_threshold
configs.hypothesis: Use a stricter entropy gate to trust layer 22 less often while preserving some savings.

configs.label: F_margin_sigmoid
configs.description: Best raw-quality control from the prior calibration sweep.
configs.hypothesis: Use margin-aware sigmoid alpha to shrink the early contribution when the layer-22 signal looks weak.

configs.label: G_top_k_mask
configs.description: Discard early logits when L22 top-1 is not inside L24 top-K.
configs.hypothesis: Fix confidently wrong early tokens by requiring directional agreement with the final-layer candidate set.

configs.label: H_top1_agree
configs.description: Only blend when the early and deep top-1 token already match.
configs.hypothesis: Prevent cross-subspace averaging from flipping the winner when the two representations disagree about the next token.

configs.label: I_deep_top1_anchor
configs.description: Keep blending, but sharply reduce alpha when the deep top-1 disagrees.
configs.hypothesis: Preserve some early signal while preventing the deep winner from being overpowered in mismatched subspaces.

configs.label: J_top_k_mask_adaptive
configs.description: Top-K guard plus adaptive alpha on the remaining blend cases.
configs.hypothesis: Keep the hard safety net of final-layer top-K agreement while tapering the early contribution continuously instead of using a single fixed alpha.
